file_title: Improving Inventory Control: Jason Wong's Contribution
introduction: Today, we'll evaluate the key strategies implemented by Jason Wong in automating our annual inventory count in 2025. His efforts have significantly impacted our inventory management and overall operational efficiency.

subsections.heading: Revamping Inventory Management: Pre-2025 Approach
subsections.content:
• Prior to 2025, Lee's Market relied on manual stocktaking every quarter
• The process was labor-intensive, involving store employees physically counting items
• The cost of manual inventory management was estimated at 1% of total revenue
• Pre-2025, the error rate for inventory count was around 2.5%
• The manual process was time-consuming and often resulted in operational downtime
• The old system did not allow real-time inventory tracking, affecting reordering efficiency
subsections.justification: This slide provides historical context and describes the previous inventory management process, not Jason Wong's role in automating it in 2025.

subsections.heading: Jason Wong's Automation Strategy: Implementation and Impact
subsections.content:
• Wong's strategy was designed to reduce human error and operational costs
• The new system was rolled out in Q2 of 2024, with full implementation by Q4
• It required significant cross-functional collaboration between IT, Operations, and Store Management
• The strategy was projected to reduce inventory errors by 50% annually
• Training was provided to all store employees to ensure smooth transition
• The system was designed to integrate with the existing POS system
subsections.justification: This slide describes Wong's automation strategy and its benefits, but it does not specify his role in automating the annual inventory count in January 2025.

subsections.heading: Future Directions: Enhancing Inventory Control
subsections.content:
• Lee's Market plans to further invest in AI technology to predict inventory needs
• The company is exploring partnerships with tech firms to optimize the system
• There is potential to use data analytics to improve forecasting accuracy
• Future enhancements may include real-time inventory tracking via mobile apps
• The company is considering using blockchain technology for enhanced traceability
• Future initiatives will continue to focus on reducing operational costs and improving efficiency
subsections.justification: This slide discusses future plans for inventory control, not Jason Wong's role in the automation process in January 2025.

conclusion: Jason Wong's automation strategy has been instrumental in improving our inventory management process. We'll continue to build upon this foundation to further enhance operational efficiency.
